nasb.text: This was to fulfill what was spoken through the prophet: “I will open My mouth in parables; I will utter things hidden since the foundation of the world.”

esv.text: This was to fulfill what was spoken by the prophet: “I will open my mouth in parables; I will utter what has been hidden since the foundation of the world.”

cnv.text: 這就應驗了先知所說的： “我要開口用比喻， 把創世以來隱祕的事說出來。”

ccb.text: 这是要应验先知的话：“我要开口讲比喻，道出创世以来隐藏的事。”

csbs.text: 这是为要应验那藉着先知所说的话： “我要开口， 用比喻说出创世以来被隐藏的事。”
